alternatives: Infer return behavior from the current navigation stack
consequences: Navigation policy stays outside rendering adapters
Return behavior is explicit across entry points
context: Cross-board flows require typed communication and explicit navigation context without coupling Board lifecycle to controller references.
decision: Use owner-defined typed IO, flows, and buses; forward navigation intent to the Board or coordinator and carry explicit return-context semantics.
migration: Replace controller reach-through with typed IO or buses, move navigation policy out of Views, and make return context explicit.
title: Board communication, navigation, and context
verification_impact: The final joined AI consistency review confirms communication, navigation, and context obligations remain aligned across Canon and Boardy specs.
